summary: Iteration 8 Complete - All 6 specific fixes verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/analytics/kpis returns interviews_scheduled=0 (no future interview slots)
Backend: /api/openings/jd/download endpoint exists and returns 404 when no JD uploaded
Backend: /api/analytics/interviews includes feedback and remarks fields
Backend: /api/analytics/dropoff-detail returns candidate list with from_count, to_count, dropped_count
Backend: Other KPIs correct - Active=19, Rejected=41, Selected=1, Total=60
Frontend: Dashboard Active=19, Rejected=41, Interviews=0, Selected=1
Frontend: Shortlisted popup shows exactly 3 candidates (Roshani, Vikrant Kumar, Dipu Sharma)
Frontend: Pipeline by Stage chart shows 'Submitted' instead of 'New'
Frontend: Job Openings modal has JD section with Upload JD button (data-testid=jd-upload-btn)
Frontend: JD preview link (data-testid=jd-preview-link) appears after JD upload
Frontend: Analysis drop-off card click opens modal with candidate list table
Frontend: Drop-off modal shows 'Entered Stage' (60) and 'Moved Forward' (20) counts
Frontend: Interviews detail modal shows feedback section
Frontend: Vendor filter works correctly - Bravia Services shows Shortlisted=2
Frontend: Vendor filter propagates to modal titles (e.g., 'Shortlisted (Bravia Services)')
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data from Google Sheets sync
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 fixes from iteration 8 are working correctly: 1) Shortlisted=3 (resume_status~shortlist AND NOT final_status~reject), 2) Interviews Scheduled=0 (only future/today slots counted), 3) Pipeline shows 'Submitted' (15) instead of 'New', 4) JD download endpoint at /api/openings/jd/download works (returns file or 404), 5) Interviews include feedback/remarks fields, 6) Drop-off detail endpoint returns candidate list with counts. Key data-testids: kpi-shortlisted, kpi-active-candidates, kpi-rejected, kpi-interviews-scheduled, kpi-selected, jd-upload-btn, jd-preview-link, drop-off-analysis, vendor-filter.

notes.fix_1_shortlisted: SHORTLISTED_QUERY in server.py line 779 now uses $nor to exclude final_status~reject. Count changed from 20 to 3.
notes.fix_2_interviews: count_future_interviews() helper at line 789 only counts slots with future/today dates. Currently 0.
notes.fix_3_pipeline: determine_current_stage() at line 435 returns 'Submitted' for past submission dates instead of 'New'. Count=15.
notes.fix_4_jd_download: /api/openings/jd/download endpoint at line 1117 returns FileResponse for uploaded JDs.
notes.fix_5_feedback: /api/analytics/interviews at line 1173 includes both feedback and remarks fields.
notes.fix_6_dropoff: /api/analytics/dropoff-detail at line 926 returns dropped_candidates list with from_count, to_count, dropped_count.
